prompt: Premium studio product shot of an AITX ALL-IN-ONE portable travel charger / power bank in brushed SILVER anodized aluminum with polished chrome edges, three-quarter hero angle. This is an all-in-one: BUILT-IN short Lightning cable AND BUILT-IN short USB-C cable that tuck into channels in the body, PLUS fold-out AC wall-plug prongs that flip out from the back for wall charging. Show the built-in cables and the fold-out wall prongs clearly. A subtle embossed orange AITX open-arms mark (from the reference), small LED indicators. Clean light-grey studio background, soft shadow. High-end premium silver all-in-one travel charger.
